goal: Rebuild Context Engineering Harness as (a) standalone Claude Code plugin pratyaksha-context-eng-harness, (b) production validation H1-H7 on real benchmarks + pallets/click case study + SWE-bench Verified A/B N>=100, (c) arXiv preprint 12 sections / 6 appendices / 13 figures / 7 tables / >=150 cites - all CLI-strict.
current_action: Worktree .worktrees/v2 created on rebuild/v2; v0 baseline frozen at docs/v0_retrospective.md; directory skeleton built for tools/dev, plugin/pratyaksha-context-eng-harness, src/v2, experiments/v2, paper.
note: AttractorFlow MCP not available in Cursor host (Claude Code plugin only); journal file used instead so the orchestration trail remains auditable. When the rebuild work itself runs inside Claude Code, the journal can be replayed via attractorflow_record_state.
